settings.faq-heading: How do I create an account?
settings.faq-content: Visit the My Account section and click ‘Sign Up’. Fill in your details to create your account and begin earning Club Inspire points.

settings.faq-heading: How do I reset my password?
settings.faq-content: To reset your password, you’ll need to log out of My Account and then go to the sign in page. Click “Forgotten your password?”, which will give you an option to reset your password.

settings.faq-heading: How do I update my delivery address?
settings.faq-content: Go to My Account at the top of the page to log in. Click edit to change or add a new address.

settings.faq-heading: How do I change my email address?
settings.faq-content: If you wish to change the email address associated with your account, you’ll need to call us on +441388 663251 or email us at customerservices@crafterscompanion.co.uk

settings.faq-heading: How do I receive Crafter’s Companion emails?
settings.faq-content: Sign up to receive our marketing emails here to find out about our latest launches and promotions, and get crafting inspiration.

settings.faq-heading: How do I unsubscribe from your emails?
settings.faq-content:
You can click the unsubscribe link at the bottom of any of our emails. Alternatively, you can contact the us on +441388 663251 or email us at customerservices@crafterscompanion.co.uk to request your removal.

View our Privacy Policy for more information.

custom_css: .wishit-faq-inner-holder {max-width: 1300px; /* You can adjust this value */ margin: 0 auto;}
wishit_faq_rNbMFW.name: Wishit FAQ

settings.faq-heading: How do I join Club Inspire?
settings.faq-content: Visit the Club Inspire page to join the loyalty program online or speak to a member of staff in-store to sign up.

settings.faq-heading: How do I earn points?
settings.faq-content: Earn points every time you shop with us. You’ll earn one point for each full £1/$1/€1 spent, based on the final amount paid, minus shipping. Additional points can be earned through special double or triple points promotions or purchasing specific products.

settings.faq-heading: Do I earn points on all purchases?
settings.faq-content: Points are earned on most purchases, but some exclusions may apply, including gift cards, taxes, and shipping fees. Check our terms and conditions for details.

settings.faq-heading: Can I earn points in-store and online?
settings.faq-content: Yes! You’ll earn points whether you shop online or in-store, as long as you use your registered account at checkout.

settings.faq-heading: How long does it normally take for Club Inspire points to get added to my account?
settings.faq-content:
For all orders placed online, your points will be added to your balance as soon as your order’s complete. Points will be deducted from your balance for any returned items.

Any points earned from in-store purchases transfer overnight, so they should appear the following day.

settings.faq-heading: Do my points expire?
settings.faq-content: No, your Club Inspire points do not expire and your cumulative points total determines which loyalty tier you’re in.

settings.faq-heading: Where can I see my Club Inspire points and loyalty tier details?
settings.faq-content: Log in to your account and visit the Club Inspire section. Here, you'll see your points balance, loyalty tier, wishlist, and account details.

settings.faq-heading: What can I use my points for?
settings.faq-content: Your points determine which loyalty tier you’re in and cannot be redeemed against products. Each loyalty tier offers different benefits, such as discounts, exclusive offers, and free gifts. Please visit our Club Inspire page for more information on each tier’s benefits.

settings.faq-heading: How do I know which tier I’m in?
settings.faq-content: Log into the Club Inspire page to find details of your Club Inspire tier and points.

settings.faq-heading: Why are my rewards and offers different from my friend’s?
settings.faq-content: The rewards and offers you receive by email may be personalised based on your account activity, preferences, and purchase history to provide a more tailored experience.

settings.faq-heading: Can I transfer points to someone else?
settings.faq-content: Points are non-transferable and can only be used by the account holder.

settings.faq-heading: How do I update my account information?
settings.faq-content: Log into My Account to update your delivery address. If you wish to change the email address associated with your account, you’ll need to call us on +441388 663251.

settings.faq-heading: How do I become a Platinum for Life?
settings.faq-content: You'll become a Platinum for Life once you’ve collected 50,000 points.

settings.faq-heading: How can I cancel my Club Inspire membership?
settings.faq-content:
If you’d like to cancel your Club Inspire membership, simply contact our Customer Service team on +441388 663251. 

They’ll guide you through the process and ensure your account is closed smoothly. Please note, your points balance will be wiped and any benefits will no longer be accessible after cancellation.

custom_css: .wishit-faq-inner-holder {max-width: 1300px; /* You can adjust this value */ margin: 0 auto;}
wishit_faq_Ah6xcR.name: Wishit FAQ

settings.faq-heading: How can I place an order?
settings.faq-content: You can place an order on the website, or by calling us on +441388 663251.

settings.faq-heading: How can I see my previous order history?
settings.faq-content: Go to My Account at the top of the page to log in. You’ll find details of your recent orders at the top of the page.

settings.faq-heading: How do I amend or cancel my order?
settings.faq-content:
You can cancel your order as long as it has not been fully processed. We are unable to add items to orders. To add a product to your order, you will need to place a new order. 

To change the details of your delivery address, remove items from your order, or to cancel the order completely, please contact us on +441388 663251, quoting the order number found in your order confirmation email.

settings.faq-heading: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.faq-content: We accept all major debit and credit cards, PayPal, and other popular payment methods.

settings.faq-heading: Do you offer any payment services?
settings.faq-content: Yes, we now accept Clearpay on www.crafterscompanion.co.uk if you are 18+ and a resident of the UK. Visit our Clearpay page for more information.

settings.faq-heading: Do you accept voucher or discount codes?
settings.faq-content: Yes, we accept voucher or discounts codes for key workers, students, and senior citizens. Please visit our voucher and discount codes page for more information on how to use them.

custom_css: .wishit-faq-inner-holder {max-width: 1300px; /* You can adjust this value */ margin: 0 auto;}
wishit_faq_a9mfnR.name: Wishit FAQ

settings.faq-heading: How long after placing my order should I expect to receive it?
settings.faq-content:
Orders are typically dispatched within 1–3 working days. During busier periods, like product launches, dispatch may take slightly longer.

UK and Rest of World orders are usually sent via Yodel; US orders via UPS, with typical delivery within 2–3 working days.

For the most up-to-date info, please visit our Delivery and Returns page.

settings.faq-heading: Do you ship to the United States?
settings.faq-content: Yes, we do ship direct to the USA. Please visit our delivery page for more information.

settings.faq-heading: Do you ship internationally?
settings.faq-content: Yes — we ship worldwide, including to the United States. Visit crafterscompanion.com for full details on delivery times and costs to your location.

settings.faq-heading: Can I return an item and receive a refund?
settings.faq-content:
Providing the products are unused, in their original packaging and in a saleable condition, you  can return an item along with a copy of your invoice for a refund. Please note that you need to inform us of the return within 14 days of receiving the item and it does need to be returned to us within 30 days of receipt. A full refund of the product cost will then be issued. 

Also, if a product is faulty it can be returned with a copy of the invoice for a full refund. 

For more information please see our returns policy.

settings.faq-heading: Can I return an item if I ordered the wrong thing?
settings.faq-content: Yes. You can return or exchange any item as long as it's unused, in its original packaging, and in saleable condition. The same 14-day notice and 30-day return window applies.

settings.faq-heading: I received my order, but something’s missing — what should I do?
settings.faq-content:
You should check your invoice to see if there is an explanation as to why a product is missing from the order.

If there is no note on the order, contact the office by telephone on +441388 663251 or email us at customerservices@crafterscompanion.co.uk and we will be able to help you.

custom_css: .wishit-faq-inner-holder {max-width: 1300px; /* You can adjust this value */ margin: 0 auto;}
wishit_faq_FVjNEY.name: Wishit FAQ

settings.faq-heading: How can I watch CTV (Crafter’s TV)?
settings.faq-content: You can watch Crafter’s TV live or on demand on our website via the Crafter’s TV section. It’s also available on Facebook and YouTube — see our Ways to Watch page for more details.

settings.faq-heading: Where can I find the CTV show schedule?
settings.faq-content: You can find the CTV show schedule here

settings.faq-heading: Can I purchase items from the shows?
settings.faq-content: Absolutely! While watching any show on our website, simply click the “Shop the Show” button to browse and buy the products featured.

custom_css: .wishit-faq-inner-holder {max-width: 1300px; /* You can adjust this value */ margin: 0 auto;}
wishit_faq_Aa6yUP.name: Wishit FAQ

settings.faq-heading: What are digital downloads?
settings.faq-content:
Digital downloads are printable products — like paper pads — that you can download instantly after purchase.

They’re perfect for cardmaking, scrapbooking, crafting on the go, and more.

settings.faq-heading: How do I access my digital downloads after purchase?
settings.faq-content:
Once you’ve completed your order, you’ll receive two emails; a confirmation of your purchase and a second email containing your download link (sent as a ZIP file).

Be sure to check your spam or junk folder if you don't see them in your inbox.

settings.faq-heading: What file formats are included in digital downloads?
settings.faq-content: Files are provided in ZIP format, containing high-resolution images (typically JPEG or PDF). You’ll need to unzip the file before using it.

settings.faq-heading: What is an SVG and how do I use it?
settings.faq-content:
An SVG (Scalable Vector Graphic) is a digital file format used with cutting machines like Cricut or Silhouette. It tells your machine where to cut, score, or draw, making it perfect for creating intricate craft projects.

You’ll need:
• An SVG-compatible cutting machine
• Design Space software (or your machine's equivalent)
• Your SVG cut file
• Adhesive cutting mat and low-tack tape
• 180gsm cardstock (check your machine's guide for best results)
• Cutting blade installed into machine
• Scoring stylus or tool.

How to use:
• Black lines: These are the cut lines — your machine will follow them to cut the shape.
• White areas: These are empty spaces or details that will also be cut out.
• Blue lines: These are score lines (for folding). If your machine doesn’t support scoring, remove these lines in your software before cutting, or they may be cut instead.

Make sure to review your machine's settings and do a test cut if using a new material or design.

custom_css: .wishit-faq-inner-holder {max-width: 1300px; /* You can adjust this value */ margin: 0 auto;}
wishit_faq_NL7t8a.name: Wishit FAQ

settings.faq-heading: Do you have physical stores?
settings.faq-content: Yes, we have one UK store located in Evesham. Click here to find directions, opening times, and more information.

settings.faq-heading: What is your Fair Usage Policy for licensed products?
settings.faq-content: Please click here to view our Fair Usage Policy.

settings.faq-heading: How can I contact Customer Service?
settings.faq-content: You can call us on +441388 663251 or email customerservices@crafterscompanion.co.uk.

settings.faq-heading: Will you share my details with other companies?
settings.faq-content: No, we won't share your details with any other companies. View our Privacy Policy for more information.

settings.faq-heading: Are you linked with Hobbymaker?
settings.faq-content: No, we are a separate company to Hobbymaker. If you have any query regarding an order placed through Hobbymaker you must contact them directly.

settings.faq-heading: How do I release the plates from my Gemini machine?
settings.faq-content:
This is normally something that happens when a Gemini user tries to pause and reverse the plates, but the plates are too far through the rollers to bring them back out. To solve this problem, switch your Gemini off, then back on and hold down the middle button for around 10 seconds until the plates are released.

Please visit our Gemini user guides for more information.
